challenges.name: Vinyl A Day May
challenges.description: One record a day for 31 days. Any genre, any era.
prompts: An album you inherited
Your first vinyl purchase
Something you bought for the cover
An album that defined a summer
A record you'd play for someone who doesn't listen to vinyl
Something you found at a thrift store
An artist you've seen live
An album with no bad tracks

A record that reminds you of a specific place
Your most played album this year
Something a friend recommended
An album that changed your taste
A debut album
Something from before you were born
An album you fell asleep to
A record you almost got rid of but didn't
Something you bought on impulse
An album you know every word to
A live album
Something that surprised you
An album tied to a specific memory
A record you'd take to a desert island
Something you've never fully listened to
An album that got you through something hard
A guilty pleasure
Something with incredible artwork
An album from your hometown scene
A collaboration or split
Something you'd recommend to a complete stranger
Your all-time favorite
